title: British Sausage Yorkshire Pudding
description: A classic British comfort food dish featuring sausages and a crispy Yorkshire pudding.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, eggs, milk, salt, and pepper.
Heat oil in a 12-cup muffin tin over medium heat.
Pour the batter into the muffin tin, filling each cup about 1/2 full.
Place the muffin tin in the oven and cook for 20-25 minutes, or until the puddings are golden brown.
While the puddings are cooking, cook the sausages in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Cook the sausages for 5-7 minutes on each side, or until browned and cooked through.
Serve the sausages with the Yorkshire puddings.
